purpose: Shared cross-language fixture for dependency-free ToolSpec input/output schema validation. Preview runtimes must reject invalid tool inputs before execution and reject invalid outputs before recording successful tool completion.

required_scenarios.name: invalid_tool_input_rejected_before_execution
required_scenarios.description: A tool with an object input_schema rejects missing required fields and does not call the tool function.

required_scenarios.name: valid_tool_input_and_output_pass
required_scenarios.description: A tool with input_schema and output_schema executes successfully when both values match the portable schema subset.

required_scenarios.name: invalid_tool_output_rejected
required_scenarios.description: A tool whose output does not match output_schema fails the step instead of recording a successful tool_call_completed event.

preview_status: implemented by Go, TypeScript, and Rust preview runtimes as dependency-free tool schema parity; optional full JSON Schema integrations remain external adapters
